content:
[{'text': "Good, I backed up to (3.48, 12.32). The robot is back in the white corridor. Looking at the map, I can see the black wall between the two corridors is solid at this location. 

I need to find a different route. Looking at the map image carefully:
- The upper white corridor is where I am now
- There's a large black obstacle between the two corridors
- The lower white corridor has the green destination
- There might be a passage on the right side of the map (east) that connects the corridors

Let me think about the map layout. The corridors appear to be horizontal. I need to find a vertical passage. Looking at the map, there seems to be a gap on the right side of the black obstacle (around x=11-12 area where I started). Let me go back east and look for a passage going south.

Let me rotate east and go back to find a vertical passage.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_015bVMPtTWJfKRUxuMBP5zmo', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 180}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
